## Workflow Complete

### Delegations Executed

| Agent | Scope | Status | Evidence |
|-------|-------|--------|----------|
| hivexplorer (wave-1a) | Scan 8 domain skills (YAML, refs, TOC) | completed | `.hivemind/activity/codescan/wave-1a/domain-skills.json` |
| hivexplorer (wave-1b) | Scan 7 depth skills (YAML, refs, TOC) | completed | `.hivemind/activity/codescan/wave-1b/depth-skills.json` |
| hivexplorer (wave-1c) | Cross-reference audit across all 15 | completed | `.hivemind/activity/codescan/wave-1c/cross-reference-audit.json` |
| hiveplanner | Master improvement plan | completed | `.hivemind/activity/plans/skill-improvement-master-plan-2026-03-28.md` |
| hivemaker (Batch 1) | Fix 3 critical skills (git-memory, delegation, skill-authoring) | completed | Verified: TOC ✅, YAML ✅, delegation 476→405 lines |
| hivemaker (skill-authoring fix) | Re-fix TOC+YAML (Batch 1 incomplete) | completed | Verified: TOC ✅, YAML ✅, 229 lines |
| hivemaker (Batch 2) | Fix 3 context+memory skills | completed | Verified: TOC ✅, YAML ✅, parent ✅ |
| hivemaker (Batch 3) | Fix 3 planning+tdd skills | completed | Verified: TOC ✅, YAML ✅, parent ✅, self-refs fixed |
| orchestrator (direct fix) | Fix second self-reference in planning | completed | Verified: 3 legitimate references remaining |
| hivemaker (Batch 4) | Fix 6 remaining skills | completed | Verified: TOC ✅, YAML ✅, parent ✅ |
| orchestrator (direct fix) | Add missing parent field to 3 Batch 1 skills | completed | Verified: all 14 skills have parent |

### Results

**All 15 Skills — Final Verification Matrix:**

| Skill | Lines | TOC | Parent | YAML | Bundled Resources | Self-Refs Fixed | Status |
|-------|-------|-----|--------|------|-------------------|-----------------|--------|
| use-hivemind | 389 | ✓ | — (entry) | ✓ | ✓ | — | **PASS** |
| use-hivemind-context | 302 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | **PASS** |
| use-hivemind-delegation | 405 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ (duplicates removed) | **PASS** |
| use-hivemind-git-memory | 194 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ (routing fixed) | **PASS** |
| use-hivemind-planning | 315 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ (2 blocks fixed) | **PASS** |
| use-hivemind-research | 123 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ (quotes removed) | **PASS** |
| use-hivemind-skill-authoring | 230 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ (consolidates fixed) | **PASS** |
| use-hivemind-tdd | 346 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | **PASS** |
| hivemind-atomic-commit | 204 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ (+1 missing entry) | — | **PASS** |
| hivemind-codemap | 204 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | **PASS** |
| hivemind-gatekeeping | 336 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | **PASS** |
| hivemind-patterns | 234 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | **PASS** |
| hivemind-refactor | 314 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | **PASS** |
| hivemind-spec-driven | 217 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | **PASS** |
| hivemind-system-debug | 91 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | — | **PASS** |

### Key Fixes Applied

1. **YAML Descriptions** — All 15 skills now have clear, consistent, ≤200 char descriptions in active voice
2. **Table of Contents** — All 15 skills now have `## Table of Contents` with clickable links
3. **Parent Field** — 14 skills have `parent: use-hivemind` (entry skill correctly has none)
4. **Duplicate Sections** — `use-hivemind-delegation` reduced from 476 to 405 lines (removed 4 duplicates)
5. **Self-References Fixed** — `use-hivemind-planning` (2 blocks), `use-hivemind-skill-authoring` (consolidates), `use-hivemind-git-memory` (routing)
6. **Bundled Resources** — All skills have complete resource tables
7. **Terminology** — Standardized across all 15 skills (canonical terms documented in guidelines)
8. **Operation Guidelines** — Updated with verification matrix and changelog

### Artifacts

- Master plan: `.hivemind/activity/plans/skill-improvement-master-plan-2026-03-28.md`
- Scan data: `.hivemind/activity/codescan/wave-1{a,b,c}/`
- Updated guidelines: `.developing-skills/refactored-skills/hiveminder-operation-guidelines.md`
- All 15 SKILL.md files: `.developing-skills/refactored-skills/*/SKILL.md`

### Next Steps

- **Ready to commit** when you authorize — all changes are in `.developing-skills/refactored-skills/` only
- **No agent files were touched** — focus was strictly on skills per your instructions
- **Up to 2 new skill entries** were NOT needed — existing 15 skills are sufficient after the improvements
